tournaments.source: woobe/wc2014 GitHub repo — data_wc2014.xlsx (sheet "model_data"), containing Betfair pre-match decimal 1X2 odds (BF_H/BF_D/BF_A) for all 64 matches, alongside Bloomberg/FiveThirtyEight win probabilities. Downloaded and parsed the raw .xlsx directly.
jimmyday12/plussixoneblog GitHub repo — world_cup_2018_betfair.csv (Betfair pre-match decimal 1X2 odds)
FiveThirtyEight SPI-based World Cup match forecasts (wc_matches.csv), retrieved via Wayback Machine archived snapshots of projects.fivethirtyeight.com/soccer-api
FiveThirtyEight SPI-based World Cup match forecasts (wc_matches.csv), retrieved via Wayback Machine archived snapshots of projects.fivethirtyeight.com/soccer-api

note: 对标真实博彩闭线（2014+2018 Betfair）。市场赔率经 proportional 去 margin。538 行为职业模型对照。RPS 越低越好；模型要「跑赢市场」须 RPS ≤ 市场。样本为可联网取得的历史赔率，不含全部淘汰赛场次。
